hero.title.line1: In the world of open source
hero.description: OpenShare connects cross-platform contributions, developer capability, organization demand, and points incentives into a verifiable value protocol for open source influence.
hero.search.placeholder: Search repos, developers, labels and more for data insights
hero.search.placeholder.unauthenticated: Login to search repos, developers, labels and more for data insights
hero.search.noResults: No matching repositories or developers found
hero.stats.platforms.description: Normalize open source signals from GitHub, Gitee, GitLab, and more
hero.stats.developers.description: Capture capability, collaboration quality, and growth trajectory
hero.stats.projects.description: Read project activity, technical influence, and ecosystem position
hero.stats.accuracy.description: Turn contribution recognition into durable incentive flow
hero.protocol.title: Contribution Value Protocol
hero.protocol.subtitle: From public activity to real reward
hero.protocol.step1.title: Capture Signals
hero.protocol.step1.description: Sync repositories, developers, labels, and community activity into one open source activity layer.
hero.protocol.step2.title: Map Capability
hero.protocol.step2.description: Evaluate real contributor value through code, collaboration, influence, and continuity.
hero.protocol.step3.title: Match Demand
hero.protocol.step3.description: Place developers, enterprises, and community needs into one searchable value network.
hero.protocol.step4.title: Return Rewards
hero.protocol.step4.description: Turn contribution recognition into ongoing participation through points and outreach.

platforms.subtitle: Data Sources
platforms.title: Aggregating Global Open Source Ecosystem Data
platforms.description: Cross-platform activity is normalized into traceable value signals and continuously enters the OpenShare contribution graph.

products.title: Building a Complete Open Source Talent Ecosystem
products.description: From value discovery to precise connection and contribution incentives, creating a closed loop of open source talent economy
products.insight.name: Insight
products.insight.subtitle: Deep Open Source Talent Insights
products.insight.description: Build developer capability profiles and value assessment systems based on multi-dimensional open source contribution data. Quantify technical capabilities, collaboration quality, and contribution trends to provide data support for talent decisions.
products.ads.name: Talent Reach
products.ads.subtitle: Precise Talent Outreach
products.ads.description: An intelligent filtering and targeted outreach platform based on developer profiles. Help enterprises and communities efficiently connect with target talents and achieve precise matching of talent supply and demand.
products.credit.name: Credits
products.credit.subtitle: Contribution Incentive System
products.credit.description: Build an ecosystem for open source contribution value circulation. Enterprises can grant incentives to core contributors, developers receive continuous recognition and rewards for their contributions, forming a virtuous cycle.
products.value1.title: Secure & Trustworthy Data
products.value1.description: Based on public open source data analysis, protecting privacy and ensuring neutrality
products.value2.title: Continuous Data Updates
products.value2.description: Real-time synchronization of open source platform data, keeping insights up-to-date
products.value3.title: Intelligent Algorithm Engine
products.value3.description: Advanced AI algorithms precisely quantify developer capabilities and contribution value

reports.title: Leading Open Source Ecosystem Insights
reports.description: Based on massive platform data and in-depth analysis, publish industry-leading reports to provide decision-making references for governments, enterprises, and developers
reports.global.title: Global Open Source Development Report
reports.global.description: In-depth analysis of global open source technology development trends, key domain breakthroughs, and future evolution directions
reports.china.title: China Open Source Annual Report
reports.china.description: Comprehensive presentation of China's open source ecosystem development status, enterprise practices, and policy environment
reports.talent.title: Global Open Source Talent Report
reports.talent.description: Focus on open source talent supply and demand, capability distribution, growth paths, and value monetization

ecosystem.title: Multi-win Value Network
ecosystem.description: Connecting developers, enterprises, and communities to build a virtuous cycle of open source talent economy
ecosystem.developers.title: Open Source Developers
ecosystem.developers.description: Technical capabilities precisely quantified and recognized
ecosystem.enterprises.title: Enterprises & Organizations
ecosystem.enterprises.description: Efficiently discover and connect with target talents
ecosystem.communities.title: Open Source Communities
ecosystem.flow.title: Value Circulation Loop
ecosystem.flow.step1.title: Value Discovery
ecosystem.flow.step1.description: Precisely quantify developer contributions and capabilities, build multi-dimensional talent profiles
ecosystem.flow.step2.title: Precise Connection
ecosystem.flow.step2.description: Efficiently match talent supply and demand, achieve two-way selection between developers and enterprises
ecosystem.flow.step3.title: Ecosystem Incentives
ecosystem.flow.step3.description: Open source contributions receive rewards, continuously driving ecosystem prosperity and value growth

cta.badge: Ushering in a New Era of Open Source Talent
cta.description: Join the OpenShare ecosystem, together with millions of developers and thousands of enterprises worldwide, to build a brighter future for open source talent economy

footer.description: Open Source Talent Value Discovery & Ecosystem Incentive Platform
footer.slogan: In the world of open source, every contribution deserves its reward

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with one of the social accounts below
auth.socialLoginFailed: Social login failed, please try again
auth.socialAuthFailed: Social account authorization completed, but an error occurred during sign-in. Please try again later, or contact the administrator to check if the backend cache service is available.
auth.socialNotConnected: This social account is not associated with the current account, please re-initiate binding from your profile.
auth.socialEmailConflict: This email is already bound to an existing account, please login with the original account first, then complete binding on the social accounts page.
auth.socialMissingCode: Missing authorization code, please try social login again
auth.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to the
auth.agreementRequired: Please read and agree to the User Registration Agreement and Points Redemption Agreement first

profile.title: Profile
profile.addAccountDesc: Choose a platform to bind. You will be redirected to its OAuth authorization page.
profile.addAccountTip: After authorization, please return to this page and refresh to see the latest status. If the social account is already linked to another account or authorization fails, an error will be shown.
profile.bindablePlatformsHeading: Available platforms (multiple accounts per platform supported)
profile.noProvidersAvailable: No social providers are currently available
profile.bindOpenedInNewTab: Authorization page opened in a new tab. Please refresh this page after completion.
profile.confirmUnbindDesc: After unbinding, you will not be able to login with {{name}}, are you sure?
profile.loginExpired: Login session expired, please login again to bind

points.title: Points Wallet
points.subtitle: View your points balance and details
points.cashPointsTooltip: Per current platform rules, every 10 points equal 1 CNY (or equivalent in other currencies).

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: View all points transaction records
transactions.mergedFromSourcesTitle: This allocation was deducted from {{count}} point sources (FIFO). The ledger keeps {{count}} entries; this row merges them for display.

allocationDetail.title: Allocation Details
allocationDetail.subtitle: Accounts covered by this allocation and the points each actually received
allocationDetail.emptyRegistered: No registered recipients in this allocation
allocationDetail.emptyPending: No pending grants in this allocation

allocationSummary.title: Allocation Source
allocationSummary.subtitle: Source information of the allocation that produced this earning

withdrawals.title: Withdrawals
withdrawals.subtitle: Manage your withdrawal requests
withdrawals.validPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
withdrawals.validIdCard: Please enter a valid ID card number
withdrawals.validBankAccount: Please enter a valid bank account number
withdrawals.noAccountTip: Please add a withdrawal account first
withdrawals.minAmountError: Withdrawal amount must be at least 200 points
withdrawals.cashPointsTooltip: Per current platform rules, every 10 points equal 1 CNY (or equivalent in other currencies).
withdrawals.internationalRateNote: For overseas accounts, payouts are converted at 10 points = 1 CNY into the equivalent foreign currency (e.g. USD). The final amount is determined by the exchange rate on the payout date.
withdrawals.regionNotSupported: Withdrawals are only available in mainland China.

withdrawalAccounts.title: Withdrawal Accounts
withdrawalAccounts.subtitle: Manage your withdrawal accounts
withdrawalAccounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this withdrawal account? This action cannot be undone.
withdrawalAccounts.domesticNotice: Sign up for the flexible employment platform and complete facial recognition to withdraw
withdrawalAccounts.internationalNotice: Please sign the labor contract to withdraw
withdrawalAccounts.infoConsistencyWarning: Please ensure the bank card number is correct, otherwise withdrawal may fail
withdrawalAccounts.bankCardDigitsOnly: Bank card number must contain only digits, no spaces or other characters
withdrawalAccounts.notSignedError: You have not completed signing. Please sign up first. Binding is available 5 minutes after signing, please wait.
withdrawalAccounts.regionNotSupported: Withdrawal accounts are only available in mainland China.

shop.title: Points Shop
shop.noItems: No items available yet, stay tuned!
shop.tagOnlyRedeem: Only the following tagged points can be used:

shop.redeemFailed: Redemption failed, please try again later

messages.title: Messages

messages.confirmDeleteSingle: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action cannot be undone.

organizations.noOrgs: You haven't joined any organization yet
organizations.orgInfoSubtitle: Fill in the information below to create a new organization
organizations.orgSlugHint: Used to identify the organization in URLs, can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
organizations.slugRegex: Slug can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
organizations.orgNameMin2: Organization name must be at least 2 characters
organizations.orgNameMax100: Organization name must be at most 100 characters
organizations.notFound: Organization not found or no access

settings.darkModeDesc: Best for using the dashboard in low-light environments

addresses.validPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
addresses.regionNotSupported: Shipping addresses are only available in mainland China.

accountMerge.title: Account Merge
accountMerge.mergeHint: After merging, the target account's data will be transferred to your account. The other party needs to confirm before it takes effect.
accountMerge.confirmAcceptDesc: After accepting, account data from {{username}} will be merged into your account.
accountMerge.confirmAcceptWarning: This action is irreversible, please confirm carefully!
accountMerge.enterTarget: Please enter target username or email

publicProfile.noMoreInfo: This user hasn't added more information

pointAllocation.title: Point Allocation
pointAllocation.subtitle: Configure and execute point allocation step by step
pointAllocation.totalPointsRoundingTip: Total points is the exact sum of each account's final distribution, equal to the actual amount deducted from the pool after execution.
pointAllocation.scaledHint: Scaled down to fit the pool's available cap
pointAllocation.insufficientBalanceHint: Pool balance is insufficient to cover the theoretical total; allocated at the maximum possible ratio
pointAllocation.globalRatioTip: Use the slider to adjust the global allocation ratio. You can fine-tune individual developer amounts afterward.
pointAllocation.resetToRatioOneTip: Reset the total allocation as close to ratio 1 as possible, and clear all manual adjustments for individual developers. If the pool balance is insufficient to cover the theoretical total, reset to the maximum achievable ratio.

profileEdit.bioMax: Bio must be at most 500 characters

profileEdit.locationMax: Location must be at most 100 characters
profileEdit.descriptionMax: Description must be at most 500 characters

orgMembers.confirmRemoveDesc: Are you sure you want to remove {{username}} from the organization? This action cannot be undone.

orgSettings.dangerZoneDesc: The following actions are irreversible, please proceed with caution

orgSettings.confirmDeleteDesc: This action is irreversible. Please enter the organization slug {{slug}} to confirm deletion.

errors.account_disabled: This account has been disabled, please contact an administrator.
errors.account_merged: This account has been merged into another account. Please sign in with the target account.
errors.invalid_token: The token is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.validation_error: The submitted information is invalid. Please review and try again.
errors.provider_not_found: The requested social sign-in provider was not found.
errors.provider_not_configured: This social sign-in provider is not currently enabled.
errors.social_authentication_failed: Social account authorization completed, but an error occurred during sign-in. Please try again later, or contact the administrator to check if the backend cache service is available.
errors.provider_not_connected: This social account is not linked to the current user. Please re-initiate the binding from your profile.
errors.email_conflict_requires_binding: This email is already linked to an existing account. Please sign in with the original account first, then complete binding from the social accounts page.
errors.invalid_exchange_code: The social sign-in exchange code is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.social_exchange_unavailable: Social sign-in is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
errors.last_auth_method: You must keep at least one active sign-in method and cannot disconnect this one.
errors.pending_withdrawal_exists: You already have a pending withdrawal request. Please wait for it to be processed before applying again.
errors.merge_request_conflict: You already have a pending merge request. Please do not submit again.
errors.merge_request_not_pending: This merge request has already been processed and cannot continue.
errors.merge_failed: The merge request could not be completed. Please try again later.
errors.field_unique: This value is already taken. Please choose another.
errors.field_max_length: The input exceeds the maximum length.
errors.field_min_length: The input is shorter than the minimum length.
errors.merge_target_required: Please enter the target account's username or email.
errors.merge_target_not_found: No matching target account was found. Please check the username or email.
errors.merge_target_ambiguous: Multiple accounts matched. Please provide both username and email for an exact match.
errors.merge_source_is_staff: Administrator accounts cannot initiate an account merge.
errors.merge_source_inactive: This account is inactive and cannot initiate an account merge.
errors.merge_target_is_self: You cannot merge an account into itself.
errors.merge_target_is_staff: The target account is an administrator account and cannot be merged.
errors.merge_source_has_pending: You already have a pending merge request. Wait until it is resolved before creating another one.
errors.merge_target_pending_limit: The target account already has too many pending merge requests. Try again later.
errors.unknown: Operation failed. Please try again later.
